items.title: QCon San Francisco 2026: 12 Tracks Announced
items.summaryShort: QCon San Francisco 2026: 12 Tracks Announced. The 12 tracks for QCon San Francisco 2026 (November 16-20) are now live.

items.title: Uber Migrates 75,000+ Test Classes from Junit 4 to Junit 5 Using Automated Code Transformation
items.summaryShort: Uber Migrates 75,000+ Test Classes from Junit 4 to Junit 5 Using Automated Code Transformation. Uber engineers migrated over 75,000 test classes from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 using automated code transformation with OpenRewrite and internal orche

items.title: Presentation: Building a Future-Proof Observability Platform to Empower Engineers
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Building a Future-Proof Observability Platform to Empower Engineers. Wayne Bell and Dan Gomez Blanco discuss the architectural and cultural shift required to scale observability at Skyscanner.

items.title: Article: MCP in the Java World: Bringing Architectural Strategy to LLM Integrations
items.summaryShort: Article: MCP in the Java World: Bringing Architectural Strategy to LLM Integrations. Discover how the Model Context Protocol (MCP) Java SDK is establishing a new architectural discipline for enterprise LLM integrations.

items.title: India's Snabbit closes $56M round as investor interest in on-demand home services heats up
items.summaryShort: India's Snabbit closes $56M round as investor interest in on-demand home services heats up. Snabbit now processes over 40,000 daily jobs and has cut costs sharply as it expands across cities and services.

items.title: Letterboxd, the social platform for film buffs, reportedly looking for new owner
items.summaryShort: Letterboxd, the social platform for film buffs, reportedly looking for new owner. Potential buyers of Letterboxd include Versant, the parent company of CNBC and MS NOW, and Hollywood media company The Ankler, according to Semafor.

items.title: Consumers lost $2.1B to social media scams in 2025, FTC reports
